channel.title: Web Design on My New Hugo Site
channel.description: Recent content in Web Design on My New Hugo Site

item.title: Typography: Ongoing Resourse List
item.description: Definitions Typeface: what it looks like Font: how it’s delivered, size, weight etc Typography: how it’s arranged, line height, letter spacing etc Links https://fontsinuse.com/ https://www.typewolf.com/ Material Design 2 Typography Guide https://m2.material.io/design/typography/the-type-system.html#type-scale
